Kyodo news agency homepage notice

July 1996
Journalism & Newsroom

Kyodo News Agency's foreign news editors maintain an online homepage where readers can submit comments to editor Tsukasa Yokoyama via email.

Foreign news editors of the japanese news agency Kyodo maintain a homepage at http://ourworld.compuserve.com/homepages/tyoko/ E-mail comments on the page to Tsukasa Yokoyama at tyoko@po.iijinet.or.jp
